programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Okavango: Water in the Desert
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta, a huge emerald oasis in the burning heart of the Kalahari desert, is fed by the Okavango River and this perpetual cycle of wet and dry is the lifeblood of this extraordinary natural Eden.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Namibia: Sands of Time
programme.desc: Namibia is an arid, rough land. However, it has been inhabited for thousands of years, by people as well as animals, and shows no sign of losing popularity with either.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Zambezi: Wild Water
programme.desc: The Zambezi is one of Africa's most influential rivers. It supports some of the continent's most spectacular wildlife. However, the Zambezi's long and winding journey destroys, as well as creates.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Nile: An African Odyssey
programme.desc: The Nile is the longest river in the world. Ancient Egypt, one of the history's most powerful civilizations, depended hugely upon it. Each year, it flooded, replenishing the fields with fertile silt. This automatic irrigation fueled Egypt's economy.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire
programme.desc: It's home to some of the world's most iconic animals  including the African great apes.
programme.sub-title: Virungas: Land of Ice and Fire

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Madagascar: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: Madagascar is truly a weird and wonderful land. Isolated on an island of extreme and magical looking locations, life has adapted and diversified. With few predators, numbers have proliferated and natural selection has gone mad.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice
programme.desc: Mount Kenya soars over 5km into the air. It is the second highest mountain in Africa. At its summit, temperatures fluctuate from over 30 degrees celsius to below freezing.
programme.sub-title: Mount Kenya: African Heart of Ice

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Cape Coast: Where Worlds Colide
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Congo: the Untamed Heart
programme.desc: Known for centuries as Africa's Dark Heart, the Congo is a multi-layered, three-dimensional world, seething with innumerable species. By peeling back the layers, we discover how this vast rainforest works, and expose the hidden lives of its inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile
programme.desc: The largest of Africa's Rift valley lakes, Lake Turkana is at the heart of one of the harshest landscapes on the planet. Despite its hostile environment, man and beast have both worked out a way to survive.
programme.sub-title: Lake Turkana: Land of the Crocodile

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ethiopia: Land of Extremes
programme.desc: Landlocked and surrounded by five countries, Ethiopia is one of east Africa's forgotten lands. Seemingly passive deserts in fact seethe with fire, and cloud-piercing peaks shield a secret Eden of canyons and cliff-tops teeming with life.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Amazon: One Jungle, Many Worlds
programme.desc: The Amazon is the largest rainforest in the world, and the richest ecosystem on earth. This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.
programme.sub-title: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Shortcut to Happiness
programme.desc: A down-and-out writer sells his soul to the devil in exchange for fame and fortune. Starring: Alec Baldwin, Anthony Hopkins, Kim Cattrall, Dan Aykroyd, Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: For The Love Of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is back! En route to a vacation in Greece Benji becomes separated from the family in Athens, Benji finds himself on the run from an assortment of international spies seeking an energy scientist, who has been working on a secret formula.

programme.title: The Simple Life of Noah Dearborn
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Sidney Poitier and Dianne Wiest star with Mary-Louise Parker in this enchanting tale about a quiet hero who becomes the talk of the town.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Deep inside the most secure bank in America, three desperate women from very different worlds cook up the most unlikely heist of the century: Smuggle out millions of dollars in worn-out currency headed for a Federal Reserve shredder every day.

programme.title: Love Potion #9
programme.desc: Paul, a geek biochemist with no luck at all with women, is persuaded by his friends to visit a gypsy. She gives him "Love Potion #9", an elixir which can potentially force anyone of the opposite sex to instantly fall in love with him.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is just your average, undercover super-assassin. When he meets Jen, he finds true love. But a picture-perfect marriage won't save Spencer from becoming a target himself. Now Spencer and Jen are on the run for their lives.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 NYC, an immigrant (Oscar Isaac) and his family try to expand their business as rampant violence and corruption drag them in and threaten to destroy all they have built.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: A father becomes worried when a local gangster befriends his son in the Bronx in the 1960s.

programme.title: The Violent Years
programme.desc: Jam Handy shows the world the glory of sexism with electric kitchen appliances and Ed Wood analyzes the world of criminals spoiled by their parents.

programme.title: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: A swarm of giant grasshoppers, inadvertently created by a radioactive experiment, heads for Chicago.

programme.title: Outlaw of Gor
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: MST3K: Werewolf
programme.desc: After digging up strange bones, a man becomes a werewolf.

programme.title: The Sword And The Dragon
programme.desc: A Russian hero plots an invasion against the Mongols in The Sword and the Dragon. Mike and the Bots create their own topical comedy show, reenact the table cloth scene from the movie, and try their hand at playing Dungeons and Dragons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild World of Batwoman
programme.desc: In this lower-than-low budget film, Batwoman enlists her band of go-go dancing Batgirls to protect the Atomic Hearing Aid from the rotten Rat Fink.

programme.title: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: Code Name: Diamond Head
programme.desc: Counterintelligence takes on new meaning in this barely coherent tale of Hawaiian espionage that takes place on movie sets meant to look like Hawaii.

programme.title: Bride of the Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo.

programme.title: Lost Continent
programme.desc: A military team sent to search for a lost rocket ends up trapped on a mountain inhabited by dinosaurs in Lost Continent.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run
programme.desc: Buttsquat's Teddy Bear washes up at Camp Lakebottom and hypnotizes the Bottom Dwellers.
programme.sub-title: Terror form the Toybox / Slimeball Run

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Slaybells / Smells Like Holidays
programme.desc: The kids almost ruin the biggest monster holiday of the year!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck
programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva
programme.desc: Rosebud is sick of everyone borrowing her stuff, and draws the line when her precious golden ladle goes missing. After eating raw cookie dough, Squirt develops a case of worms!
programme.sub-title: Camp Lockdownbottom / All You Need is Larva

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Big Top Terror / Slimal Fear
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood

programme.desc: Buttsquat steps in to help the bottomdwellers when they suddenly acquire the same red hair and freckles as their Sunny Smiles nemesis. When an alien invasion threatens Camp Lakebottom, the kids defend the camp against the alien mothership!

programme.desc: Things start disappearing around Lakebottom!

programme.sub-title: Cheeks of Dread / Doo Doo Doomsday

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Camp Plantbottom / Game Over

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pirate of Ickygloomy / Attack of the 50-Foot Squirt
programme.desc: While playing Pirates on a shipwreck the Bottom Dwellers must battle the ghost Spitbeard the Pirate.
programme.sub-title: Pirate of Ickygloomy / Attack of the 50-Foot Squirt

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Stage Fright / Frankenfixer

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Escape from Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt arrive at Camp Lakebottom to find themselves held captive by a zombie.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cabin Fever / It's a Horrible Life

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee.T / The Great Tiki Hunt

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pranks for Nothing / Zombie Dearest

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Seven Foot itch / Being McGee

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee's First Flush / House of Ear Wax

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 200
programme.desc: Can a trench with perfect 90-degree corners absorb an explosion's shockwave inside the trench better than a trench with rounded corners?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 47
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a deadly crossbow be made from materials available to prison inmates? Can vodka remove the smell of cigarettes from clothes or kill bees like an insecticide?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Myths tested: Could using a phone in a thunderstorm result in being electrocuted? Could a bullet pass through a man's genitals, into a woman's abdomen and subsequently make the woman pregnant?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 60
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can speaker power alone destroy a car? Will driving faster on a bumpy road smooth out the ride?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 216
programme.desc: Is an axe more effective than a gun when you are swarmed by zombies? Can the force of many people bust down a door? Can you escape from a horde of zombies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 151
programme.desc: Are some types of people more tolerant to pain? Can a BBQ propane tank heat up enough in a fire to launch through a garage roof like a rocket?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 144
programme.desc: Can you skip a car over a lake? Is a toilet seat cleaner than other household items?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 150
programme.desc: Can someone really be knocked out of their socks? Is the force exerted between two cars crashing into each other at 50mph the same as a single car hitting a wall at 50mph?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 20
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can someone survive a multi-story elevator fall by jumping right before the elevator hits the bottom of the shaft? Is it possible to make a hovercraft with a vacuum motor?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 173
programme.desc: Did the Syrians design a water-skimming torpedo as early as the 13th century? If a truckload of wine catches fire, will the bottles blow their corks 100 feet and sound like a machine gun?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be propelled off a toilet seat by dropping a lit cigarette into it when filled with combustible materials? Is running better than walking to keep dry in the rain?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 180
programme.desc: Is it impossible for humans to walk in a straight line without a point of reference? Will binary explosives explode in the case of a fender bender?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 190
programme.desc: Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake? Can the weight of a bird be enough to tip a teetering car off of a cliff? Can a water heater turned on its side be used as a cannon?

programme.title: MythBusters: Upfront Demolition Derby Special
programme.desc: When a bus is moving at over 50 miles per hour, will moving passengers to the inside of the turn keep the bus from flipping? Will a car dropped from 4,000 feet fall faster than a speeding car?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 163
programme.desc: Is it more difficult to escape from a sinking car that flips upside down than from one that remains right-side up?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 125
programme.desc: Can a person swim faster in syrup than in water? Can two targets be hit with one shot by splitting a bullet on an axe blade? Can a steel door be blown open by the gunpowder from six bullets?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build
programme.desc: Contestant will be standing in either end of two large cylinders, suspended in the air over water. Player must grab a mouth full of insects, then place into a meat grinder using their mouth. Inside the tanker truck, it would be filled with water.
programme.sub-title: Tumbler Transfer, Grab and Grind, Tanker Truck Flag Build

programme.title: Fear Factor: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi
programme.desc: Contestants are placed in a box with two plexi-glass walls that will be lifted off the ground. Contestants will be served live snails. Contestants are seated in a car that is in the back of a semi truck.
programme.sub-title: Twirling Misery, Eat Live Snails, Car Jump Out of Back of Semi

programme.title: Fear Factor: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform
programme.desc: Contestants will be dangled from a rope off a roof. Contestants will also have to clear a bug splattered car windshield using only their mouth and face.
programme.sub-title: Extreme Building Plunge, Bug Windshield, Rotating Beam To Platform

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll
programme.desc: Contestant will stand on top of a truck as it speeds trying to grab as many flags. Contestants will shoot potatoes at a target using a shoulder mounted air cannon.
programme.sub-title: Tunnel Flag Snag, Potato Bug Bazooka, Tractor Car Roll

programme.title: Fear Factor: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang
programme.desc: Contestants will have to play miniature golf to determine the size of a sea cucumber they will have to eat. They will also be seated on the back of a jet ski driven by a professional driver.
programme.sub-title: Murphy Bed Transfer, Fear Factor Minature Golf, Helicopter Bar Hang

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer
programme.desc: Contestant will be wrapped in a vest of chains. The contestants will crawl, climb and swim through an obstacle. In this stunt the contestant will be sitting in a helicopter flying approx. 20' over the water.
programme.sub-title: Bound in Chains, Get The Gator, Helicopter Rope Transfer

programme.title: Fear Factor: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand
programme.desc: Three co-ed couples will be placed on a tight rope and suspended over water in a heart-pounding stunt. In another, players will be stacked in boxes.
programme.sub-title: Team Transfer, Hag Fished, Cable Stand

programme.title: Fear Factor: Family Beam Walk, Family of Roaches, Kid-a-Pult
programme.desc: The parent and the child will have to cross a beam above the water releasing flags along the way. Cockroaches are being poured into the box while the child sits in a box without a top. In this family stunt the child will start by standing on the dock.
programme.sub-title: Family Beam Walk, Family of Roaches, Kid-a-Pult

programme.title: Fear Factor: Underwater Limo Escape, Gross Blow Tube, Car Building Couples Rescue
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.
programme.sub-title: Underwater Limo Escape, Gross Blow Tube, Car Building Couples Rescue

programme.title: Fear Factor: Heli Platform Escape, Roadkill Cafe
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the ladies of Fear Factor, escaping from a helicoper platform and eating roadkill.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp
programme.desc: Contestants will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water.
programme.sub-title: Underwater Safe Save, Tongue Bob and Transfer, Truck Car Ramp

programme.title: Fear Factor: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter
programme.desc: Contestants ride a bicycle on top of semi trucks, squeeze the juices out of hornworms, and walk on a beam between buildings in this jaw-dropping episode.
programme.sub-title: Bike Plank Between Box Trailers,Tomato Horn Worm Juice,Teeter Totter

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong
programme.desc: In one bizarre stunt from this episode, contestants must wear a helmet filled with moray eels. In another, they ride on a moving platform to retrieve flags.
programme.sub-title: Jet Ski To Float Plane, Eel Helmet, Donkey Kong

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed into a helmet filled with spiders in one horrifying stunt, then couples will be bound to a platform by their ankles in another.
programme.sub-title: Dual Heli Disc, Spider Head, Sinking Counter Balance

programme.title: Fear Factor: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing
programme.desc: A contestant will be strapped by their waist, ankles, and wrists then locked to the face of a wheel, half underwater. Contestants must also stand on a swaying platform hanging from a helicopter in this sibling-themed episode.
programme.sub-title: Water Paddle, Fear Factor Bar, Heli Surfing

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing chain mail, shoot a flaming arrow at a scarecrow target, and be placed in a coffin filled with bugs.
programme.sub-title: Tesla Coil Beam, Witches Brew, Bug Tumbler

programme.title: Fear Factor: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall
programme.desc: Contestants will climb out of the moving tram and grab a net attached to the tram. Contestants will drink a shake consisting of rats. A plexi-glass wall with a lip hangs under the helicopter and they must traverse the wall releasing flags along the way.
programme.sub-title: Tram Cargo Net Climb, Rat Stew, Dual Suspended Heli Wall

programme.title: Fear Factor: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.
programme.sub-title: Seperating Platform Transfer, Underwater Cage Escape, Siphon Dump Transfer, Jet Ski Launch

programme.title: Fear Factor: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie
programme.desc: Contestants will stand on a car suspended over the water by a crane and more in this exciting episode.
programme.sub-title: Rolling Flag Snag, Sand Crab Panning, Suspended Car Rotisserie

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll
programme.desc: A blindfolded contestant will be guided by their partner's verbal commands to a tank filled with leeches. Contestants will also stand on a tube being suspended in the air from a crane.
programme.sub-title: Submerged Tubes, Blind Leech Wall, Suspended Log Roll

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go?

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The River Lift
programme.desc: Ice Pilots is about an eccentric airline and its motley crew that fly vintage planes on impossible arctic missions. Buffalo Airways attracts young pilots seeking Arctic adventure and the chance to fly big, old, piston powered aircrafts from a bygone era.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: The Finish Line
programme.desc: A mission to the Far North has Devan, Scott and Adam facing a series of obstacles. From an oil-spewing engine on one plane to a gas-guzzling engine on another, it's an ongoing battle to maintain fluid levels as they circuit their destinations.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Ski Plane
programme.desc: Young pilots AJ and Andrew get the chance of a lifetime to fly the magnificent DC-3 specially equipped with skis to land on frozen strips.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination. Patient C-46 co-pilot Scott Blue finally gets his crack at the DC-4.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: British Invasion
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes. The father-son duo makes a great team.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Lockdown Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: As the clash between Yusei and the Chief comes to a shocking conclusion, Yusei must figure out a way to win the battle before his life points get zapped to zero.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 1
programme.desc: After being freed from the Facility, Yusei risks being re-incarcerated when he tries to take back his Duel Runner from Sector Security's vault.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Take Back, Part 2
programme.desc: With Officer Trudge in hot pursuit, Yusei looks to rev his game up before the long arm of the law grabs a hold of him for good!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel to Remember
programme.desc: When Yusei can't remember his own name, he agrees to duel a pint-sized player named Leo in the hopes of getting his memory back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Bloom of the Black Rose
programme.desc: As Leo and his pal Dexter venture into the narrows of New Domino City to find the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose, Blister breaks out a plan to keep Yusei's friends in the Satellite Sector safe from Goodwin's goons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Welcome to the Fortune Cup
programme.desc: The stage is set for the Fortune Cup as eight elite duelists vie for the chance to take on reigning champion Jack Atlas. However, for the Master of Ceremonies Rex Goodwin, it's not about who wins or loses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Battle With the Black Rose
programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surprise, Surprise!
programme.desc: With the first Turbo Duel of the Fortune Cup set to start, a surprise guest forces Yusei's competition to take an unexpected pit stop.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1
programme.desc: Director Goodwin enlists the hypnotic powers of the Professor to expose Luna as a Signer and uncover the secrets she unknowingly knows of the Duel Monsters Spirit World.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between the Professor and Luna continues, Luna looks to keep a promise she made to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but in order for her to succeed, she must first break free of the hypnotic hold the Professor has on her.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Second Round Showdown, Part 1
programme.desc: The semifinals of the Fortune Cup are about to begin, and the first match of day two features Yusei going toe-to-toe with the tower of power - Greiger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Second Round Showdown, Part 2
programme.desc: With no cards left in his hand and his life points about to get blasted by Greiger, Yusei has one draw left to take down this tower of power to keep in the hunt to duel Jack in the championship round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dueling Minds
programme.desc: In the second battle of the semifinals, Akiza squares off against the professional profiler Commander Koda, but with her tournament life on the line, can Akiza outplay an opponent who claims to know her every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale one win away, Yusei and Akiza get set to battle it out as Director Goodwin anxiously awaits the final Signer to reveal their Mark of the Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Duel of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Akiza and Yusei rages on, Yusei is forced to unleash his mighty Stardust Dragon in order to stop Akiza's grisly garden from squeezing his life points into submission.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Fortune Cup Finale: Part 1
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale about to kick into overdrive, Jack decides to clear the air and reveal the truth behind his escape from the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Fortune Cup Finale, Part 2
programme.desc: With the finish line of the Fortune Cup fast approaching, Yusei and Jack find themselves on a collision course with destiny as they race to unlock the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Web of Deceit, Part 1
programme.desc: After defeating Jack to win the Fortune Cup Finale, Yusei is challenged to a Shadow Duel by an underground duelist whose mind has been taken over by the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Web of Deceit, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and his robed rival rages on, Yusei must rely on his deck if he plans to survive this Shadow Duel and uncover the truth behind the Dark Signers sinister scheme to destroy the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Good Cop, Bad Cop
programme.desc: After agreeing to help Yusei meet with Director Goodwin, Officer Trudge unknowingly becomes one of the Dark Signers' drones and challenges a wounded Jack Atlas to a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Hoping to gain Yusei's trust, Director Goodwin decides to share with him the secrets behind the origin of the Satellite Sector and the ongoing war between Signer and Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Reunion Duel
programme.desc: After returning to the Satellite Sector, Yusei meets up with his old friend Crow and soon finds himself in a tag team Turbo Duel with Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 1
programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 2
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 3
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Dark Signs, Part 4
programme.desc: The safety of the world hangs in the balance as Yusei tries to figure out a way to outduel and outmaneuver the unstoppable power of Kalin's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Supersensory Shakedown
programme.desc: Leo is forced to take part in an extrasensory examination with the leader of the Arcadia Movement. Can Leo pass this pop quiz, or will this psychic showdown with Sayer leave Leo locked up forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 1
programme.desc: With Lazar's creepy clowns about to crack Crow's defense, Crow hatches a plan to lull his opponent into a false sense of security so that his feathered friends can swoop in and swipe the last of Lazar's life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 2
programme.desc: Yusei gets caught up in a web of lies after agreeing to square off against Roman, the leader of the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Digging Deeper, Part 3
programme.desc: With the safety of his friends literally hanging in the balance, Yusei must figure out a way to squash Roman's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him and his pals to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash of the Dragons, Part 1
programme.desc: Luna gears up to face Devack in a Shadow Duel, but before the first card can be thrown, Luna is transported back to the Spirit World, leaving her pint-sized brother Leo the tall task of taking down this Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash of the Dragons, Part 2
programme.desc: As Luna searches the Spirit World for a way to free Ancient Fairy Dragon from her stone prison, Leo searches his deck for a card combo that will help him defeat Devack and his army of apes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Suture the Circuit
programme.desc: Blue Angel takes on the mastermind who developed the virus that deletes duelists!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Signs of Time
programme.desc: Luna and her new found friend Torunka hatch a plan to free Regulus from King Zeman's minus curse. Meanwhile, back in the Satellite Sector, Leo calls upon his Power Tool Dragon to help him dismantle Devack's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 1
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Surely, You Jest, Part 2
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 1
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Spider, Part 2
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 1
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Mark of the Monkey, Part 2
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: Shocking twists follow after bank manager David Walsh is fired, dumped by his fiancée and shot in the span of a day. Starring : Matt Dillon, Steve Zahn, Christina Applegate. (Comedy/Drama)

programme.title: Battling for Baby
programme.desc: After Katherine (Courteney Cox) decides to return to work to help pay the bills, her baby's grandmothers (Debbie Reynolds & Suzanne Pleshette) argue over who will take care of her child.

programme.title: Let Go
programme.desc: Featuring the king of comedy Kevin Hart, this hilarious, unconventional and heartfelt journey is all about love, loss and other felonies! Discontent parole officer Walter is struggling with the humdrums of married life.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: 30 Days until I'm Famous
programme.desc: A Latina working in Los Angeles as a messenger is randomly discovered and fashioned into a pop music star.

programme.title: Cup of Love
programme.desc: Zoe Walker is a food scientist who's been sent to Colombia to design a coffee flavor that appeals to millennials. In the village of Salento, Zoe meets Diego Valdez, a local plantation owner who is reluctant to work with her.

programme.title: Nobel Son
programme.desc: On the eve of Barkley Michaelson's father receiving the Nobel Prize, Barkley is kidnapped and the requested ransom is the $2,000,000 in Nobel Prize money.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Dark Echoes: Haunted Barn Unveiled
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplained as we explore a barn filled with uncharted spirits, whispers from the other side, and chilling encounters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting Echoes: Clarke Zoo's Secrets
programme.desc: Join us on a chilling investigation as we unravel the spectral enigmas within Clarke Zoo Gardens. Eerie encounters and eerie secrets await.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma
programme.desc: In the heart of Clarke Zoo, paranormal activity reigns. We journey deeper, uncovering spine-tingling apparitions and ghostly revelations.
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Veil: Zoo's Ghostly Enigma

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Factory Whispers: Unraveling Unknown
programme.desc: In 'Whispers in the Factory,' our team delves into a historic site, where eerie voices and enigmatic questions haunt every corner. Uncover the mysteries of restless spirits as we journey through a chilling landscape of the unknown.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads deep into the Pendle Hills in search of the Pendle Witches that went to trial in 1612 and were hung for witchcraft. The investigation takes an unexpected twist with a stop at the New Inn, Pendles most haunted pub.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Pendle Hill and ventures even deeper into the hills. The night takes an unexpected turn with a dramatic ending, which he believes was caused by the witches.
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Pendle Witches - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to the town of Morley to investigate the infamous Morley Market. A place once bustling with people from years gone by, it is now haunted by shadow figures, and they appear to want to make themselves known.
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues the investigation at Morley Market and appears to be followed by a spirit person that wants to touch him and distract him from investigating certain parts of the main hall. Will he uncover who this spirit is?
programme.sub-title: Shadow Menace Haunting Morley Market - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean returns to his former, haunted home. No tenant has ever been able to stay the full term. Sean wants to seek out the spirits once and for all, to finally find out what is haunting his former home.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Horror at Sandhole Cottage - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of Sandhole Cottage and appears to be in direct contact with the spirits that haunted any tenants that came to live there. Will he finally get them to rest?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean delves deep and opens a new chapter for the Ghost Dimension Flying Solo series as he investigates Leeds Library, to uncover what is haunting and frightening the staff that work here.
programme.sub-title: Opening The Book at Leeds Library - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Leeds Library and attempts to communicate with a spirit known by the name of Sternberg. Will his investigation have a happy ending?
programme.sub-title: Closing The Book at Leeds Library - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Altrincham, Greater Manchester to investigate The Old Market Tavern. Once used as a coaching inn and a court house, many spirits still lurk here and Sean captures one of the most clearest EVP's ever.
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his paranormal investigation at The Old Market Tavern and he appears to have attracted the attention of spirit that launches a physical attack on him. Will he survive the night?
programme.sub-title: Secret Spirits at The Old Market Tavern - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo
programme.desc: Sean heads to Astley Green to the infamous Astley Green Colliery Museum. So many reports of paranormal activity have been confirmed at the mine, from lost miners to tormented souls.
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation into Astley Green Colliery Museum and attempts to make further contact with the souls and spirits who have lost their lives there. Will he succeed?
programme.sub-title: Digging Deep Astley Green Colliery Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Oswestry to investigate claims of hauntings at a castle thousands of years old, and believed to be haunted by an angry judge. Will any of the souls that departed here come out to play?
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the castle and attempts to make contact with the spirit world. It appears he is not alone.
programme.sub-title: Historic Hauntings of Whittington Castle - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: 14 Ghosts of The Bate Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to Macclesfield, Cheshire to investigate a building said to be haunted by 14 ghosts and also the lost soul of a witch. With so many spirits in one of the oldest public houses in the UK, will any of the ghosts join him tonight?

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Devon with some interesting wallpaper, a marvellous flat in Kensal Green and a valuable bit of land in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 30
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Dorset that's full of surprises, a property on Portobello Road in London and a cottage in Newquay.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Kent, Derbyshire and Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit a flat with communal gardens near Twickenham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a a house in Swindon, a flat in Neasden, Greater London and revisit a fabulous Manor Farm house near Lincoln.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 38
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander & Martin Roberts visit a north London flat, a colossal house in Kent and a 17th Century cottage in Wiltshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander look at houses in Sale, Mayfair and Burnley.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit properties in Middlesex, Kent and Manchester.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a bungalow in Lincoln with a vital missing door, a 7 bedroom house in South Norwood and a Swindon semi in need of a revamp.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 28
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cheap terrace in Devon in need of a lot of work, a house in North London and a cottage in Cheshire that's been left untouched for years.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Derby with some fire damage, a property in Cardiff in need of an update and a Quarry in Wadebridge, Cornwall.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 22
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts look at a boarded up house in Manchester, a property in Seaford, East Sussex with a stunning sea view, and finally a grade II listed property in Knaresborough, North Yorkshire with plenty of room for improvement.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties on the Isle of Sheppy, in Plymouth and Reading.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a building plot in Sutton in Ashfield, a semi detached house in Southampton and a static mobile home in a retirement community in Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit houses in Derby, Kent and Trent.

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Frankenstein's Castle of Freaks
programme.desc: When a Neanderthal man is lynched by villagers, Count Frankenstein (Rossano Brazzi) uses his years of research to bring the monster back to life. (1984)

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Keep The Aspidistra Flying
programme.desc: When successful advertiser, Gordon Comstock (Richard E. Grant), abruptly walks away from his career to pursue his dream of being a poet, his path is much more difficult than expected and soon financial problems begin to pile up.

programme.title: Jungle B
programme.desc: A boy raised by wild animals tries to adapt to human village life.

programme.title: Scott of the Antarctic: Scott of the Antarctic
programme.desc: The story of British explorer Robert Falcon Scott's 1912 expedition and his quest to be the first to reach the South Pole.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: The Lair Of The White Worm
programme.desc: After a mysterious skull is unearthed, it's stolen and used by its new owner to worship a pagan god who hungers for the taste of virginal flesh in this cheeky horror-comedy.

programme.title: This, That and the Other
programme.desc: It’s 1970 and we’re now all officially living in the ‘Permissive Society’! Three lucky British men find that everyday life is getting decidedly naughty in this saucy British sex comedy!

programme.title: Psycho Cop
programme.desc: Six college students on their weekend vacation are humiliated and killed one by one by a psycho cop.

programme.title: Naked Vengeance
programme.desc: A beautiful woman seeks revenge for the tragedy forced upon her family.

programme.title: Hunter: War Zone
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall work to stop a brigade of suburban mercenaries plotting to break a drug dealer out of prison.

programme.title: Hunter: Burned
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.

programme.title: Hunter: Scrap Metal
programme.desc: When a dying contract killer confesses he was once paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter goes in pursuit of the true murderer.

programme.title: Hunter: Fagin 1986
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: 62 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Machine
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Beautiful & the Dead: Part 1
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Beautiful & the Dead: Part 2
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: The Return of Typhoon Thompson
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Saturday Night Special
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Overnight Sensation
programme.desc: Hunter attempts to apprehend a vicious robbery suspect while he clashes with a vindictive reporter bent on destroying the detective's career.

programme.title: Hunter: Change Partners and Dance
programme.desc: Detectives Hunter and McCall must work individually to investigate the killing of a police officer after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.

programme.title: Hunter: Crime of Passion
programme.desc: McCall belives that a man accused of murdering his wife is innocent.

programme.title: Hunter: The Castro Connection
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall attempt to break a cocaine syndicate apparently being run by one of Hunter's most trusted ex-partners.

programme.title: Hunter: High Noon in L.A.
programme.desc: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Hunter: From San Francisco with Love
programme.desc: A beautiful San Francisco police detective aids Hunter and McCall in solving a series of puzzling murders apparently connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.

programme.title: Hunter: True Confessions
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jason Plato is joined by ex-Ferrari F1 driver Mika Salon to pit the brand new £100,000 Mercedes C63 AMG Black Series against its key rival from BMW

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jonny Smith goes behind the scenes at the gruelling Isle of Man TT motorbike race, and spends the day with TT hero and 19 times winner John McGuinness. Tiff Needell races around the infamous TT circuit in the brand new Subaru BRZ sports car.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Denmark experiencing the exciting world of motorbike speedway with triple world champion Nicki Pederson. Jonny Smith visits Ferrari's hi-tech aluminium factory before taking their latest California supercar out

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jonny Smith is at the biggest American car show in the world – which takes place just outside a small town in Sweden. He judges the prestigious best in show competition, goes on a late night cruise and tests the brand new Corvette Grand Sport.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 10
programme.desc: Vicki holds a spectacular race against a jet plane, in the ultimate test of the brand new Porsche Boxster. Jonny heads to Norway to test the all new Ford Focus ST hot hatch on an incredible mountain road that every driver should visit in their lifetime

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 11
programme.desc: Jason's in Italy to drive the most talked about hypercar of the year – the 730bhp Pagani Huayra. He's given an exclusive tour of how this incredible machine is made at the company's HQ, and lets the car off the leash on road and track.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 12
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Jonny Smith pit two brand new four door supercars head to head at the track – Mercedes CLS63AMG versus Porsche Panamera GTS. Jason heads to the Netherlands to drive what could be the maddest supercar of the year

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 13
programme.desc: Tiff Needell is joined by rally star Kris Meeke for a hot hatch showdown. With four brand new models lined up at the track, they hold a high octane knockout tournament to find which is fastest of all.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 14
programme.desc: Jonny enters the world of professional drifting as competes in the famous Gatebil show in Norway, driving a specially modified BMW M5. To give himself a fighting chance, he first arranges some tuition from the 2011 British Drift Champion Matt Carter.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 15
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is joined by Norwegian rally prodigy Andreas Mikkelsen for a high octane motoring triathlon - racie in a 200bhp off road buggy, perform an autotest in a Skoda Fabia hot hatch, and battle wheel to wheel in single seat race cars.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 16
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson is in Italy testing the most powerful Ferrari ever made, the brand new 730bhp F12berlinetta, to the limit. Tiff and Jason are at the track with the two cheapest hot hatches on sale – the Suzuki Swift and Renault Sport Twingo.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 17
programme.desc: Vicki goes behind the scenes of famous Italian car designers Pininfarina – the people who have shaped every single Ferrari of the last 50 years. Tiff is joined by British rally star Mark Higgins in a test of two new SUVs with supercar power figures

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 18
programme.desc: Tiff is joined by German motoring legend and 'Queen of the Nurburgring' Sabine Schmitz for a head to head battle between our two favourite sports cars of the last year – the BMW M6 and Porsche 911.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell hold a high octane track test of three brand new super glamorous convertibles from Audi, Maserati and Mercedes. Vicki Butler-Henderson races wheel to wheel with World Superbike hotshot Chaz Davies

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Vicki Butler-Henderson and Tiff Needell pit what could be the greatest drivers' car of the century – the Toyota GT86 – against its tough rival from Renault Sport. Jonny Smith is in Spain to put Jaguar's brand new F-Type through its paces

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jonny Smith reveals the secrets of 21 st century car crash testing. He goes behind the scenes at a crash test performed by experts EuroNCAP, before conducting his own shocking crash test between a car and a van.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tiff Needell heads to LA to check out the latest car trend to take the USA – restomodding. It's the art of sympathetically restoring classic cars to modern standards, while retaining their original charm – and Tiff's behind the wheel of LA's best examples

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jason Plato and Tiff Needell host a battle of the best cheap hot hatches on sale. The Ford Fiesta ST, RenaultSport Clio and Peugeot 208 GTI are all thrashed to the limit before Tiff and Jason reveal the champion.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tiff Needell is joined by German petrolhead legend and Queen of the Nurburgring Sabine Schmitz. They're finding the ultimate machine for thrill seekers, pitting the latest Caterham 7 against its hardcore rivals from Morgan and Ariel.

programme.title: Fifth Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Tiff Needell and Jason Plato celebrate the 100th anniversary of Aston Martin. Jason drives James Bond's DB5 from Skyfall and learns from the the master craftsmen at the company's heritage centre, while Tiff tests the brand new Rapide S four door supercar

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers lurk in society, mostly acting alone. Sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their cold power to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people’s babies, they spilt blood for money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Love
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion, one that sits in the core of our soul and fills our lives with hope. But when love turns sour, the results can be deadly. In an act of revenge, these deadly women unite with one common goal, to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sacrifice Their Blood
programme.desc: To the outside world these caring mothers present a face of love - a suburban Mom, a caring community member, a housewife - but when the doors close, these deadly women will do whatever it takes to have their own needs met, even destroy their family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: These women burn madly with anger so deep they'll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn on the ones they love? Find out as we explore the reasons for a lover's revenge.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sins of the Sister
programme.desc: A sisterly bond can mean a life full of friendship and sibling love. But for some women, having a sister means nothing more then having their own personal meal ticket, scapegoat and combatant. These types of relationships can lead to deadly outcomes.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge
programme.desc: Every day, teenage girls are being scolded by their parents, only to respond with tears and slammed bedroom doors. Some daughters won’t take "no" for an answer, and these girls become deadly.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Family Secrets
programme.desc: A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Under Fire
programme.desc: A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.desc: Was Presidential hopeful, Robert F. Kennedy really killed by disgruntled Palestinian Sirhan Sirhan as we’ve been led to believe? Or was he another in a long line of Manchurian candidates, a victim of a long standing mind control program.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Victorian Farm
programme.desc: The team embark on a trip by steam train. Ruth embarks on a tough task in the dairy. Alex tries his hand at bee-keeping. The sheep get sheared using the latest time-saving technology.

programme.title: Victorian Farm

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
