programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Cage
programme.desc: Kenda finds the bullet-ridden bodies of a middle-aged couple in a musty suburban house alongside the corpses of their two beloved pets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shattered
programme.desc: When two teens discover a lifeless body in the street, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if the killer was a jealous lover or just plain unhinged.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cotton, Ricky, and Lila & Duke
programme.desc: An American Eskimo watchdog who takes his role too far; a Shibu Inu with a mean streak; a boxer who was attached by another dog one day in the park, and has since become more aggressive.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: India, Jagger, and Axl
programme.desc: A Manchester Terrier attacks family members, bikes, skateboards, and visiting guests. Jagger needs to learn how to take a walk without wreaking havoc. Cesar tries to rehabilitate an ocean-phobic dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Baby Girl
programme.desc: Suzie Dove Miles, a "cat whisperer," is set on getting a fearful Doberman mix at a shelter. Suzie has tried many of Cesar's exercises with Baby Girl, but needs Cesar’s expertise to help Baby Girl become a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You
programme.desc: At six years old, beagle Gizmo has become very aggressive. Jennifer Lee Pryor runs Pryor’s Planet, a rescue organization to honor her late husband, comedian Richard Pryor.
programme.sub-title: Beagle Mania, Rescue Me… Rescue You

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Delta and Dong Dong
programme.desc: Delta, a dog with aggressive behavior and a fear of men. Dong-Dong, a rescue from Taiwan, who has found solace in the living room chair of his adopted home. He won’t get up for anything.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Not So Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: A Border Collie is overly protective of her owner, nipping at anyone who comes near her. A Police Officer rescued a German shepherd, who is people and dog aggressive and always ready for a fight.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs
programme.desc: There's high-octane excitement as Cesar meets NASCAR driver Kevin Harvick's snappy Chihuahua, and an aggressive Pekingese called Gizmo.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer train their troublesome pets.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Diego and Berkeley
programme.desc: An Argentinean hunting dog develops aggression towards other dogs. A rescued 2-year old terrier/corgi mix has a fear of traveling, specifically, the zippers of his doggie carrier.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Run Home Roscoe!
programme.desc: When Jorge Huerta first laid eyes on him, six month old Akita Roscoe, seemed like a normal, happy puppy. Since joining the Huerta family, Roscoe has refused to go outside the family’s property.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Power of the Pack
programme.desc: The pack is a vital tool. In this intimate and revealing episode, witness some of the most memorable moments and experience the power of the pack.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pekaso and Yogi & Smokey
programme.desc: Pekingese Pekaso won’t eat or drink. Five year old Chihuahua, Valentino, bites those who get close to her owner. And, two Chow mix brothers have major sibling rivalry.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Rana & Ruby
programme.desc: Scared of everything, Ruby the Vischla deals with her neuroses by biting. At the same time, Rana barks every time bread pops in the toaster, or when the microwave goes off, or when the phone rings.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Titan, Candy and Bella
programme.desc: A new puppy has "Young and Restless" soap star Michael Damian's cat cornered, MTV's "Downtown" Julie Brown wants to unspoil her Yorkie, and a 120-pound Rottweiler needs anger management training.

programme.title: Baywatch: Money, Honey
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Fabulous Buchannon Boys
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch: Point of Attack
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch: Sandcastles
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch: Thin or Die
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life threatening... Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Trophy, Part 1
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Trophy, Part 2
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch: Reunion
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: Baywatch: War of Nerves
programme.desc: Drug lord Mason Sato is released from prison and determined to seek revenge Mitch Buchannon, who helped send him away. When Sato kidnaps Hobie and Kaye, Mitch and Sato end up in a samurai-style fight to the death.

programme.title: Baywatch: Big Monday
programme.desc: Reports of a coming storm and enormous waves bring painful memories for Mitch. Meanwhile, Kaye tries to persuade the parents of a deaf girl to send her to sign-language school.

programme.title: Baywatch: Sea of Flames
programme.desc: A drugged-out drifter torches Eddie's lifeguard tower which leads the team to discover an illegal, lab distributing a new drug. Mitch and Thorpe try to convince the city board to buy wave runners in order to optimize their ability to save lives.

programme.title: Baywatch: Now Sit Right Back and You'll Hear a Tale
programme.desc: Eddie slips on sand and hits his head on the tower ramp. When he regains consciousness, Eddie finds himself on an island with Gilligan, Mary Ann and the rest of the castaways.
programme.sub-title: Now Sit Right Back and You'll Hear a Tale

programme.title: Baywatch: The Chamber
programme.desc: Mitch has an out-of-body experience when his attempt to save a trapped diver without scuba gear leaves him with the bends, dangerously close to death and in desperate need of a decompression chamber.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shark's Cove
programme.desc: Shauni is suspicious when a swimmer training for the Olympics disappears in "Shark's Cove.” Eddie's world is turned upside-down when he is reunited with his schizophrenic half-brother.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Lost Treasure of Tower 12
programme.desc: A bohemian poet flirts with Shauni, and with danger, when he uses his metal detector to find the buried stash of two jewel thieves.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Big Spill
programme.desc: Mitch helps a former lifeguard, Lane Brody, investigate a corporation suspected of dumping deadly chemicals in the bay.

programme.title: Baywatch: Game of Chance
programme.desc: Harvey and Mitch go to play poker on an offshore yacht where they are robbed by a masked man that drives an amphibious Jeep. Shauni invites Eddie over for dinner at her parents’ house where her snobbish father strongly disapproves of him.

programme.title: Baywatch: Summer of '85
programme.desc: Shauni and Eddie visit a local fortune teller who predicts that Eddie will soon meet his first true love. Shauni thought he already had, and that it was her! But it's Lorna, an older woman Eddie had a "Summer of '42" affair with as a teenager.

programme.title: Baywatch: River of No Return, Part 1
programme.desc: The mysterious death of Mitch's uncle and the cryptic will he left, finds Mitch, Hobie, Eddie, and Shauni on a whitewater rafting adventure. Meanwhile, rookie lifeguard hopefuls participate in the annual qualifying swim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: "Bloody Mary… " It was just a silly wishing game; one that Lindsey and her friends had played a thousand times in front of a dozen different mirrors.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Peter Newman wants a brand new mountain bike. That's the grand prize for winning the school's talent competition. Now all he needs is a talent.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Katie and Andy Lawrence, moving to a new town is painful enough. But when their parents take them on a boring sight-seeing tour, it's nothing but torture.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Everyone in Baskerville knows about Jimmy Leeds. In fact, Adam and his friends have been telling scary stories about Jimmy for years—stories they don't really believe.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Willy Tyler has the coolest train set-up ever. It takes up half of Willy’s attic and encompasses everything from medieval times to the Wild West.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Catan Thomas and his cousin, Lea, being trapped in Bumbleweed for a family reunion and their grandfather’s 70th birthday is painful enough.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: When Cody visits his grandparents at Shady Acres, he’s not expecting to find any excitement at all.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: It’s all Sammy’s fault. If only he and Nina hadn’t been out in those woods in the first place. If only they hadn’t seen that creepy old tree with the strange little door.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Dead Part of the House
programme.desc: A young girl moves into a new house with her father and aunt, and before long, she makes friends with the ghosts of three girls who reside in an upstairs nursery -- though the adults assume that her new "friends" are her three new dolls.
programme.sub-title: The Dead Part of the House

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Vision
programme.desc: On a battlefield during the first World War, a group of French soldiers experience something which causes them to drop their weapons and walk away from the fight.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Devil's Laughter
programme.desc: Convicted killer John Marriott is seemingly becoming the hardest man to execute.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Return of Mitchell Campion
programme.desc: A man visiting a small Mediterranean island is stunned when all of the island's residents recognize him and insist that he is an island resident who has returned after many years, even though he knows he has never been there before.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Navigator
programme.desc: The crew of a nineteenth century sailing ship find that somebody has altered its course before catching a stowaway, a mute, soaking wet Oriental whom they clap in irons.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Secret
programme.desc: A young woman is left alone and unloved by her domineering and arrogant husband.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Aerialist
programme.desc: An argument between two trapeze artists results in an accident in which one is paralyzed.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Burning Girl
programme.desc: Alice Deering is a shy teenage girl who is trying to fit into a new community, make new friends and coexist with her abusive aunt and insensitive father, who insists she's a pyromaniac despite her pleas of innocence.

programme.title: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: A trip into the mountains of West Virginia for a weekend of hiking turns into a bloody horror fest.

programme.title: The Vanishing On 7th Street
programme.desc: When a power outage plunges the city of Detroit into darkness, a disparate group of individuals find themselves alone. The city’s population has vanished into thin air, leaving behind heaps of empty clothing, abandoned cars and lengthening shadows.

programme.title: Tall Men
programme.desc: A man is stalked by tall phantoms in business suits after he purchases a car with a mysterious black credit card. Are they from the bank, or something altogether more evil and supernatural? Tall Men is terrifying supernatural thriller.

programme.title: Wishmaster
programme.desc: From executive producer Wes Craven comes this fantasy-horror cult classic that spawned three sequels. When a jewelry appraiser is given an ancient gem, she unwittingly unleashes an immortal spirit that grants humans wishes in exchange for their souls.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Candidate
programme.desc: Margaret finds herself inadvertently running for City Council when the candidate she is supporting drops out of the race.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mummy's Boy
programme.desc: Bobs mother is coming all the way from England to visit him.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: On the Case: Texts, Lies, and Videotape
programme.desc: When a young mother disappears, a series of text messages from her phone lead police to believe she left on her own. Then, her family uncovers evidence that she may have actually been the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Terrifying Calls
programme.desc: A Wilmington, North Carolina, woman is reported missing after she fails to show up for her own birthday celebration. Police never imagined that their investigation would ultimately reveal a gruesome second crime.

programme.title: On the Case: When, Where, and Who?
programme.desc: A 15-year-old girl vanishes from her front porch, and police have only a few short hours to determine who saw her last, where she was going, and who would want her dead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the beginning of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: The Disappearance of Sarah Stern
programme.desc: A car is discovered abandoned in the middle of a New Jersey bridge, with the keys inside and no driver in sight. Detectives look at three possibilities. Sarah Stern either ran way, jumped off the bridge, or was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: When Wendi Brant was found brutally murdered in 1998, her estranged husband quickly became a person of interest. But he wasn't the only potential suspect, and this case would continue to baffle police for decades.

programme.title: On the Case: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: A compassionate and outgoing woman's dream vacation turns into a deadly nightmare when she crosses paths with a wolf in sheep's clothing.

programme.title: On the Case: A Thin Disguise
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger ambushes a family as they pull into their driveway. Could the memories of a five year old girl be the key to solving the crime?

programme.title: On the Case: No Escape
programme.desc: A young woman's disappearance marks the beginning of a heartbreaking murder mystery. Will a clue discovered by a child be the key to catching his mother's killer?

programme.title: On the Case: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: When a 26 year old wife and mother vanishes, investigators wonder if she simply just ran away or if it was something far more sinister. The search for answers would take nearly a decade and lead her family on a dark journey they could never have imagined.

programme.title: On the Case: No Exit
programme.desc: A young couple, out on the town in Washington D.C., is gunned down in a savage attack. Investigators are at a loss. Would it take another murder to solve the mystery?

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Destruction
programme.desc: When a 14 year old girl is murdered detectives must solve several terrifying crimes before they can bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Betrayal
programme.desc: After missing newlyweds are found murdered, family members and friends point fingers at each other, leading investigators to believe someone close to the victims is responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: On the Case: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: On the Case: Christina's Story
programme.desc: When a young girl vanishes while walking her dog on a military base, it marks the beginning of a missing persons case that would capture the hearts of the entire county.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Obsession
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman is found murdered out in the New Mexico wilderness, police must unravel her killer's twisted obsession in order to solve the crime.

programme.title: On the Case: The Smallest of Clues
programme.desc: A burned out car and a blood-stained bedroom reveal the chilling murder of a community pillar. Will it be the smallest of clues that lead police to her heartless killer?

programme.title: On the Case: "Precious" Jane Doe
programme.desc: After a young woman is viciously murdered, police launch a two-part investigation; one to find her killer and a second to identify his victim, "Precious" Jane Doe.

programme.title: On the Case: Wedding Day Nightmare
programme.desc: A young woman getting ready to be a bridesmaid at her best friend's wedding is found viciously stabbed to death in her own home. Was the killer also a guest at the celebration?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, a collector, uses an ancient necklace to get Sydney to help her in raising Athena who will then help her conquer the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: When Sydney's student Meg's roommate finds a witch's amulet, it hospitalizes Meg. Meg's boyfriend's fraternity brother races to get the amulet. What is he up to?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: While Sydney is lecturing about the Native Americans who faced a mysterious cataclysm 600 years earlier, a native brings her a relic from that era. What is its secret?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Hunting with the Enemy
programme.desc: An urn commissioned in a Cambodian monastery by the Chinese emperor for the remains of Confucius is about to be destroyed by systematic bombing of a whole province.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons
programme.desc: A strange globe appears on Moya, sucking in Crichton and duplicating him creating two additional people.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog
programme.desc: The crew bring aboard an alien tracker to remove some creatures that came aboard hidden in some cargo.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E14 - Beware Of Dog

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again
programme.desc: Crichton has returned to Earth. Or has he always been on Earth all this time? People from his past and present appear.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E15 - Won't Get Fooled Again

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E16 - The Locket
programme.desc: A temporal distortion traps Aeryn and John on a planet's surface, where they live out the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Crais and Talyn return. The crew are put on trial for an attack that Talyn made on an alien ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari
programme.desc: A Nebari group comes aboard Moya and attempts to mind cleanse everyone using a drug. Pilot and Rygel are the only two who can resist the effects.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Combination
programme.desc: Johnny goes public with his vision of a heavyweight contender dying in an upcoming bout but instead of stopping the fight, his announcement turns it into the pay-per-view event of the year.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Visions
programme.desc: Johnny sets out to discover the secret of a mysterious man (Frank Whaley) who appears to be stalking him but actually has a life-changing message for Johnny.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 1
programme.desc: Johnny becomes the prime suspect in a case involving a missing woman and is confronted by her sister (Sarah Wynter), who clamors for his arrest.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of two brothers who murdered a marketing manager on Christmas Eve 2014 using chloroform.
programme.sub-title: The Perfect Murder: Roger& David Cooper

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Countryside Killings: Graham Backhouse
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines why Graham Backhouse attempted to kill his wife with a car bomb before murdering his neighbour in 1984.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.
programme.sub-title: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Shipman
programme.desc: Doctor Harold Shipman was convicted of killing 15 patients in 2000, but he is thought to have killed up to 215. Discover how he was eventually caught by detectives.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephanie Slater
programme.desc: Estate agent Stephanie Slater reveals the story of her abduction, rape and incarceration, which occurred in 1992 whilst showing a man around a house.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt was thought to be a 'model' nurse. Very astute, caring and always willing to help, why did she murder four children and attempt to kill 11 others?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Omagh Bombing
programme.desc: Survivors, victims' relatives and former detectives reflect on the Real IRA car bomb that killed 29 people in Omagh, Northern Ireland in 1998.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: Cheerleader On Trial
programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: Murder In Wisconsin Field
programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: Murder At The Mall
programme.desc: In 1979, 18-year-old Michelle Martinko was found brutally stabbed to death in the car park of a shopping mall in Cedar Rapids, Iowa. 39 years later, DNA evidence from the crime scene finally led to a suspect and a murder trial.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: The Farmer's Wife
programme.desc: When Shirley Carter was found murdered in her farmhouse kitchen, her abusive husband Bill was considered a prime suspect. But her husband pointed the finger at someone else - his son Jason. It was up to the jury to decide who to believe.

programme.title: NEW Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Russia's Mountain Mummy Enigma
programme.desc: Russian soldiers make a grim discovery on a mountain. An abandoned town has an unusual past. Scientists working in Antarctica find something surprising beneath the ice. In Greenland, strange depressions in the ground are investigated.

programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Ancient Oland Island Massacre
programme.desc: On a Swedish island, archaeologists discover a grisly site. The wreckage of an American Navy plane is located in a surprising place. Finnish farmers unearth something shocking. A baby mammoth found in the permafrost is studied.

programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.desc: Alex escorts a pretty socialite to a dance at her country club.

programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.desc: Seduced by an "older woman" of twenty-one, the hitherto inexperienced Alex is devastated to learn that she thinks of their relationship as casual.

programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree

programme.title: Moesha: Life Imitating Art
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Moesha: Home Is Where The Car Is
programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Car Is

programme.title: Moesha: Girl’s Night In
programme.desc: At a slumber party, Moesha and her friends reminisce (with clips from past episodes) about the past four years together.

programme.title: Moesha: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Kim’s mother, Nikki, is re-entering a journey she started 18 years ago. With Dee’s help, she will be completing her education to receive a high school diploma.

programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.desc: Royal Children

programme.title: Behind The Palace Walls: Royal Wives
programme.desc: The life of a Royal Wife has never been easy but the focus of the media in modern times has often made their lives infinitely more complicated.

programme.title: Camilla
programme.desc: This highly acclaimed documentary is a major piece of investigative television telling the intriguing love story of Prince Charles’ long standing relationship with Camilla Parker Bowles before and after his marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeenshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Scotland bringing their property-finding mission to the granite city-Aberdeen. Both sets of house hunters have relocated here for work, both are looking for family homes-and both want to find them quickly.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: New England
programme.desc: This week we are with one couple who have babies on the brain and another who are only 3 months from having one.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Lincolnshire
programme.desc: With a wide range of budgets across the whole of the UK, Phil and Kirstie are challenged at every turn, and there are many!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Leeds
programme.desc: From two young first-time buyers looking to settle down to a family who have been scarred by a previous purchase, this search challenges Kirstie and Phil in ways they never anticipated.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Chelmsford
programme.desc: Location, Location, Location is off to Chelmsford this week to solve the property problems of two couples at opposite ends of the budget scale.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Riverside
programme.desc: London is one of the most expensive and competitive cities to buy property in the world so they're going to have to pull out all the stops if they're going to make these property dreams a reality.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Welsh Borders
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are dealing with a full-blown mid-life crisis in the Welsh Borders! Management trainer Mel has set them the challenge of finding a hillside home to house his very own leadership and team building centre

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: St Albans
programme.desc: Searching in prime commuter territory where property isn't cheap. Both couples have high expectations for their first homes and our duo will need all of their property know-how to come out on top!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hackney
programme.desc: This week we're guiding two first time buyers through the property jungle that is East London. Rosie Evatt and Laura Coveney have been friends since childhood and are pooling their resources to buy their first property together.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Aberdeen City
programme.desc: Newlyweds Emma and Mike are bursting to move on and up.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Southbank
programme.desc: We have a teenager with an epic budget keen for independence; and a young couple with high hopes that their funds will stretch to the dream flat. Kirstie and Phil are on their home turf –can they secure a famous victory?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Jersey
programme.desc: This week we're on Jersey hunting for a fabulous family home for the young couple Nick and Katrina. We show them the many highs and lows this Channel Island has to offer.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey - and at opposite ends of the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hastings
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Hastings, and they've got a stormy search ahead of them. Life's a beach as our intrepid property experts try to find the dream home for two sets of tricky house-hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Warwickshire & Chelmsford
programme.desc: This week we're catching up with two couples whose extensive requirements almost drove us to distraction.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tufnell Park
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bucks & Aberdeen Revisit
programme.desc: In Buckinghamshire, Emma and Andrew had been looking for the ideal family home, whilst in Aberdeenshire Karen and Russell needed to cut down their daily commute.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Windsor -with two sets of well-traveled first time buyers

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Northside
programme.desc: Kirstie's house hunter is London born and bred and has viewed a whopping 90 properties already-whilst Phil's couple have yet to view a single place and have no idea where to buy.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Revisit 2: Jersey/Warwickshire
programme.desc: This week we're going back to visit two very different sets of house hunters who had one thing on their minds – space, and they wanted lots of it!

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from the Central region– Sue Ellis, Richard Bainbridge, and Aktar Islam pull out all the stops with their fish dishes, hoping to impress former champion, Glynn Purnell.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Main
programme.desc: The chefs from the Central region battle it out with their main courses. Aktar Islam, Sue Ellis, and Richard Bainbridge are determined to win but which dish will take the poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from the Central region to impress former champion, Glynn Purnell, as today the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Central Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from Central region. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Starter
programme.desc: It's the South West chefs battling it out – John Hooker, Paul Ainsworth, and Andre Garrett. Former Great British Menu champion Michael Caines will decide which dishes deserve the highest scores. The chefs begin with their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from the South West region– Paul Ainsworth, John Hooker, and Andre Garrett pull out all the stops with their fish dishes, hoping to impress former champion, Michael Caines.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Main

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from the South West to impress former champion Michael Caines, as today the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition.

programme.title: Great British Menu: South West Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from South West. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Starter
programme.desc: It's the Scotland chefs battling it out – Michael Smith, Philip Carnegie, and Tony Singh. The chefs begin with their starters, in a bid to get their menu through to the judges tasting.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Fish
programme.desc: The chefs from Scotland – Tony Singh, Michael Smith, and Philip Carnegie pull out all the stops with their fish dishes, hoping to impress veteran chef Alan Murchison.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Main
programme.desc: The chefs from Scotland battle it out with their main courses. Philip Carnegie, Tony Singh, and Michael Smith are determined to win but which dish will take the poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Dessert

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Judging
programme.desc: It's decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from Scotland. One chef left the competition and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, and Oliver Peyton.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Starter
programme.desc: It's the Welsh chefs battling it out – Aled Williams, Gareth Jones, and Hywel Jones, with Angela Hartnett deciding who will get through to the judges on Friday The chefs begin with their starters.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Main
programme.desc: The chefs from Wales battle it out with their main courses. Aled Williams, Gareth Jones and Hywel Jones are determined to win but which dish will take poll position?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Dessert
programme.desc: It's the last chance for the chefs from Wales to impress veteran chef Angela Hartnett, as the one with the lowest total score from across the week will leave the competition. Aled Williams, Gareth Jones and Hywel Jones deliver their desserts.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Starter

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Channing Tatum
programme.desc: Channing Tatum hikes, explores and climbs during his expedition to Yosemite National Park. The pair begin with a helicopter ride, move through dense forest, then eat some dangerous food.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lindsey Vonn
programme.desc: Bear and Olympic gold medallist Lindsey Vonn take a speedboat trip, then swim to shore and make their way along a rugged coastline; after traversing a deep chasm, they collect a dinner of sea urchins.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Derek Hough
programme.desc: Dancer Derek Hough joins Bear on an adventure across the mountains of Bulgaria; Derek reveals childhood struggles and teaches Bear some dance moves.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Jesse Tyler Ferguson
programme.desc: Actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson joins Bear on a 6,000-foot descent along the cliffs and ridges of Croda dei Toni; Ferguson shares insight about his sudden rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Sing-along Duets: Shakira Ft. Wyclef Jean / JP Saxe Ft. Julia Michaels / John Travolta & Olivia Newton-John / Shawn Mendes & Camila Cabello / Ariana Grande & The Weeknd / Jay-Z Ft. Beyoncé
programme.desc: Hips Don't Lie (Shakira Ft. Wyclef Jean) / If The World Was Ending (JP Saxe Ft. Julia Michaels) / You're The One That I Want (Grease) / Señorita (Shawn Mendes & Camila Cabello) / Love Me Harder (Ariana Grande) / 03 Bonnie And Clyde (Jay-Z Ft. Beyoncé)

programme.title: Sing-along Duets: Madonna Ft. Justin Timberlake / Elton John & Britney Spears / Luther Vandross Ft. Mariah Carey / P!nk Ft. Nate Ruess / Bill Medley & Jennifer Warnes
programme.desc: 4 Minutes (Madonna Ft. Justin Timberlake) / Hold Me Closer (Elton John & Britney Spears) / Endless Love (Luther Vandross Ft. Mariah Carey) / Just Give Me A Reason (P!nk Ft. Nate Ruess) / The Time Of My Life (Jennifer Warnes & Bill Medley)
programme.sub-title: Madonna Ft. Justin Timberlake / Elton John & Britney Spears / Luther Vandross Ft. Mariah Carey / P!nk Ft. Nate Ruess / Bill Medley & Jennifer Warnes

programme.title: Sing-along Duets: Rema & Selena Gomez / Labrinth Ft. Emeli Sandé / Aretha Franklin & George Michael / Nelly Furtado Ft. Timbaland / Ed Sheeran Ft. Taylor Swift / Youssou N'Dour & Neneh Cherry / Drake Ft. Rihanna / Evanescence Ft. Paul McCoy
programme.desc: Calm Down (Rema & Selena Gomez) / Beneath Your Beautiful (Labrinth Ft. Emeli Sandé) / I Knew You Were Waiting (Aretha Franklin & George Michael) / Promiscuous (Nelly Furtado Ft. Timbaland) / The Joker And The Queen (Ed Sheeran Ft. Taylor Swift)
