programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Numbers! Numbers!
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it./Barney and Baby Bop are thrilled when BJ sets up a bug zoo in the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Fountain of Fun
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
programme.desc: Barney's friends are playing a fun game of "I Can Do" where they each share something they can do. When BJ suggests having an "I Can Do" show, Baby Bop becomes worried.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Good Egg
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Music Box
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is surprised to learn that “The Land of Mother Goose” truly exists. Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, and Riff wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just can’t wait to see what it is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Briana takes an STI test after her night with Luis. Chelsea takes Aubree out for a mother-daughter day. Leah and Victoria visit her boyfriend in Costa Rica. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Hello From the Other Side
programme.desc: Jade graduates beauty school but family complications threaten her big day. Chelsea guides Aubree as she considers inviting Adam to the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Taking Charge
programme.desc: Briana confronts Luis about her STI test results. Jade is forced to support her family after they all lose their jobs. Aubree reconsiders the Father/Daughter dance. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Where Have You Been?
programme.desc: An explosive family brawl leaves Jade caught between Sean and her parents. DeVoin's family reappears in Briana and Nova's lives after being absent for years. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Dilemmas and Debacles
programme.desc: Jade is caught between her mum and Sean, but a drug test could reveal the truth. Leah is forced to balance her growing concerns for Ali and supporting her sister during childbirth. (S10, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Impossible Choice
programme.desc: Tensions erupt when Jade asks her parents to move out. After an x-ray, Leah grapples with the possibility that Ali's condition is progressing. Briana and family move into their new house. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Piece of Me
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents. (S10, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Do Something
programme.desc: The coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. (S10, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Until the World Ends
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana's new fling has the potential for major heartbreak. (S10, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Remote Control
programme.desc: Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown. (S10, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not So Normal Times
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say. (S10, ep13)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Sassi tries to stay calm on a romantic getaway. Amber gives Ste the cold shoulder. Sleep-deprived Chloe questions if getting a puppy was a good idea. Shannon resits her GCSEs. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: This Girl Can
programme.desc: Sassi is a woman on a mission as she starts her new job. Shannon heads to the seaside where Charlie's wandering eye threatens to derail their family holiday. Ste lays his heart on the line. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Normal
programme.desc: Sassi moves into her dream home with Darren, Amber meets a new man, Chloe and Jordan try to freshen up their relationship, while a stressed out Shannon is desperate for time on her own. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber's flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe's relationship reaches breaking point. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber's birthday ends in tears. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bizarre New World
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin fight about finances. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated. (S10, ep14)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Tongue-tied
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade and Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. After their intense text fight, Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday. (S10, ep15)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Say OK
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. (S10, ep16)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Catelynn
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler both have very dramatic home lives, and it gets even more complicated when Catelynn falls pregnant. They have some important choices to make, but can they cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Life After Labour
programme.desc: In this special episode Dr. Drew Pinsky discusses each girl's episode, issues and challenges and update us on what's going on now. There will also be questions from viewers and the audience.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Hosted by Dr. Drew. A look back at the undiscovered stories from season one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jenelle
programme.desc: Jenelle, a North Carolina beach bunny who loves partying, realizes her long-distance boyfriend isn't coming back, and that she's too immature to raise a baby herself.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Nikkole
programme.desc: Nikki is a prankster princess whose posse of friends love her, but hate her boyfriend. Can she convince her friends and family that Josh is worthy of being a father to their son?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Chelsea
programme.desc: Popular high school senior Chelsea loves her school life and her boyfriend Adam. She thinks life will be the same after she gives birth, but instead learns this may not be the case.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lori
programme.desc: Lori's parents want her to choose adoption, but as someone who was adopted herself, she doesn't want her baby to be haunted by all that's haunted her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha is a cute, bubbly 'good girl' who never missed a homework assignment, but she devastates her family when she follows in her mother's footsteps and becomes a teen mum.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Nicole
programme.desc: Nicole is dating a 15-year-old, and although they're in love, not everyone in the family is supportive. They both have a lot of growing up to do when a baby joins the picture.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Leah
programme.desc: West Virginia cheerleader Leah is having twins with a boy she was dating for one month. If that wasn't hard enough, she develops health issues that put the babies' lives at risk.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Lizzie
programme.desc: Lizzie's pregnancy forces her to drop out of high school and the marching band. She looks to her boyfriend Skylar for support... until she discovers he hasn't always been faithful.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kailyn
programme.desc: Kailyn's mum moved in with her new boyfriend, forcing Kailyn to live with her young boyfriend's family while she attempts to go to college.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Brooke
programme.desc: After a shotgun wedding, Brooke and Cody are forced to sacrifice car racing for parenthood. Now they're trying to balance high school life and moving in to their own place.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Felicia
programme.desc: The youngest of five, Felicia's the only one in her family with a shot at graduating. But when it gets tough with her boyfriend and she leaves home, will she be forced to drop out?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, an all-American girl, has to leave her majorette baton and boyfriend behind, as she moves an hour away and faces the pressure of starting over in a new school and town.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Markai
programme.desc: Pregnant Markai and her boyfriend James may be kicked out of her house when her mum has had enough. So will Markai finish school and can their relationship survive James's infidelity?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Aubrey
programme.desc: Aubrey and Brandon must find a home and start over in a new town, all while she tries to get her GED. They get married, but will their fresh start cause them to resent one another? (S2, ep16)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Christinna
programme.desc: Christinna and Isiah have had to change their college plans as they prepare for their baby. His family is furious when he gives up his scholarship. Can they make it on their own?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla is a southern belle. Now that she's pregnant, she has to start making her own tough decisions about marriage and her ability to make it without the help of her parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Megan
programme.desc: While her dad's in Afghanistan, Megan gets pregnant. But with little money and a video game playing boyfriend not necessarily in for the long haul, she'll have to grow up fast.

programme.title: CSI: New York: My Name Is Mac Taylor
programme.desc: When two men who share the same name as detective Mac Taylor are killed, detective Taylor rounds up all the other Mac Taylors in New York and tries to figure out who will be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Triangle
programme.desc: CSI investigates the death of a armored truck security guard, which appears to be related to a disturbance at a so-called "Bermuda Triangle" of electric activity near the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rush To Judgment
programme.desc: While investigating the death and dismemberment of a high school wrestling coach, detective Flack gets in trouble when a suspect dies in his custody.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Green Piece
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed--but the daughter is part of the terrorist group. Meanwhile, Danny considers proposing to Lindsay again.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Communication Breakdown
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe who were some of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Prey
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Past, Present and Murder
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him? During the investigation, Mac discovers that the case is connected to an earlier case involving a missing flash drive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Greater Good
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labor, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify to a grand jury against his father, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Blacklist (Featuring Gravedigger)
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health-care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three-state area. But does the city really have a serial killer on their hands, or is there another explanation?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Battle Scars
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realizes it's the third victim of the Compass Killer. Meanwhile, detective Flack, still dealing with Angell's death, goes AWOL.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Death House
programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Second Chances
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Flag on the Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Sanguine Love
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Formula
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Uncertainty Rules
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Three-Way
programme.desc: Three suburban housewives on a girls' weekend in Miami are the prime suspects when the hotel's handsome pool boy is found murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: The CSI team must race against time when all evidence in a murder case points to Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Felony Flight
programme.desc: A convicted serial killer escapes after sabotaging an airplane that was flying him from New York to Miami, where he allegedly buried a body.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Nailed
programme.desc: The CSI team are called out to investigate the murder of a young woman who was about to sign her divorce papers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Urban Hellraisers
programme.desc: Eric finds himself in the middle of a robbery while at the bank. The team soon learns that the bank robbery is part of a video game called "Urban Hellraisers" being played out in real life.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Shattered
programme.desc: A drug lord is gunned in his Coconut Grove mansion and a suspect arrested at the scene claims he sells marijuana to Delko. Rick Stetler, from Internal Affairs, investigates and the case quickly becomes personal when Horatio gets involved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: The Score
programme.desc: The CSI team investigate the brutal murder of a man who was learning how to pick up women. Meanwhile, Horatio tries to help out Marisol, Delko's sister, who was arrested on drug charges.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Silencer
programme.desc: The Mala Noche strike again and it's up to the CSI team to bring them down once and for all. Major secrets are revealed about the characters and their personal lives.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Fade Out
programme.desc: When evidence shows that a series of murders is linked to organized crime, Horatio and the team are instead lead to a pair of film students who possess a screenplay containing the details of the crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Skeletons
programme.desc: When Horatio's nemesis, Walter Resden, targets someone from their past, Horatio tries to stop him. Delko's relationship with Natalia is tested when she thinks she may be pregnant.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Collision
programme.desc: A horrible car accident that claims the life of a woman turns out to be a murder case. During the investigation Natalia confesses a secret history of marital abuse in order to help the case to be solved.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Driven
programme.desc: After a group of wealthy young women's cars are stolen from a luxury day spa, evidence leads the CSI's to believe that this is a part of a much larger car chopping scam and each of these women are being targeted for a home robbery.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Free Fall
programme.desc: The CSI team must try to find out who is trying to kill a young couple who are released from prison. The couple, who become a Bonnie and Clyde type “media darlings” soon discover that not everyone regards them as such.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: High Octane
programme.desc: When a man is decapitated while doing a daring stunt with his car, the team suspects that it was more than just an accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going , Going, Gone
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a deadly plot against the City of Miami after a young woman is murdered at a charity event. He and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: When a Marine recruiter is murdered, the CSIs must delve into the world of enlisting soldiers and the families they leave behind.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Backstabbers
programme.desc: Sonya Barak is standing trial for aiding in a plot to destroy Miami when her own people try to gun her down. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Throwing Heat
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Darkness of Nights
programme.desc: On a cold Virginia night, a pretty and popular teenage girl vanishes. As snow blankets the region, worry grows, leaving everyone to wonder: where’s Tara Munsey?

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: North Pole Slay Ride
programme.desc: North Pole, Alaska is a quiet, safe-haven, best known for Santa Claus. But when the bodies of young women begin turning up one by one, investigators slowly discover the unlikeliest of killers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: World’s Worst Fugitive (Part 1)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been living under a cloud of suspicion for decades.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)
programme.desc: The unbelievable story of Robert Durst, the millionaire heir to a vast real estate fortune who has been living under a cloud of suspicion for decades.
programme.sub-title: Robert Durst: Nobody Tells the Whole Truth (Part 2)

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill (Part 1)
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.
programme.sub-title: Dr. Death: A License to Kill (Part 1)

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Oscar learns that his favorite hangout, Langford's, is in financial trouble, he impulsively asks Felix to help save it, without considering the disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: I Kid, You Not
programme.desc: Oscar tries to prove to Charlotte that he can be responsible when he volunteers to take her son, Evan (Caleb Brown), trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days
programme.desc: Oscar reconnects with many significant people from his father's life when he agrees to carry out Walter's last request to spread his ashes behind the candy factory he once owned.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: To avoid a night of boredom, Oscar suggests that Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) take Felix out on their artsy cultural dates in his place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Should She Stay or Should She Go?
programme.desc: Felix meets a fun-loving woman, Natasha (Busy Phillips), in a bar and takes her home for what is meant to be a one-night stand.
programme.sub-title: Should She Stay or Should She Go?

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Batman vs. The Penguin
programme.desc: Murph gets Oscar to agree to participate in a regular TV segment where he competes with a penguin at the zoo to predict the winners of hockey games.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.

programme.title: The Millers: 72
programme.desc: When Tom proudly tells the family he's dating a much younger woman, Nathan goes undercover to spy on him and make sure his father isn't being scammed by a gold digger.

programme.title: The Millers: Sex Ed Dolan
programme.desc: Nathan introduces his boss, Ed Dolan, to Tom in hopes they'll hit it off and hang out together, but surprisingly, Dolan only has eyes for Carol. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 103
programme.desc: They met when she was 16, now thirteen years and three children later, their marriage is on the rocks because he parties and pursues his dreams, so she presents Judge Rhonda with the support contract she wants enforced

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 97
programme.desc: Sisters with a terrific relationship are torn apart by a two-year old being a toddler, and Judge Rhonda calls a foul on their bickering.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 37
programme.desc: Two comedians with the same last name find out they are halfbrothers when they happen to work together, but a rude joke about one of their mothers brings them into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 137
programme.desc: Sisters who grew up in separate households became "petty partners" as adults are in Judge Rhonda's courtroom squabbling over a girl trip to Puerto Rico that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 76
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces the case of a man who thinks the rent and utilities he provided for his pregnant girlfriend because she could not work as an exotic dancer was a loan she should pay back.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 53
programme.desc: Her nephew, the make-up artist who specializes in gore, left her car a "bloody" mess after he hit a tree on the way to work and she wants Judge Rhonda to make him clean up the damage.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 29
programme.desc: An Exotic Dancer and her cousin the photographer sashay into Judge Rhonda's court at odds over who should pay for the pictures

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 150
programme.desc: Family squabbles can become destructive, especially when money is involved.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 57
programme.desc: A comedian claims his cousin the canibus festival promoter didn't pay for his performance; Judge Rhonda weeds through the facts for her verdict.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 41
programme.desc: When a Carpenter sees on social media that his cousin has been building her best life instead of paying him back he constructs a case for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 133
programme.desc: A Fairy Tale romance goes horribly wrong when a former lover enters the picture and Judge Rhonda must solve the mystery of a birthstone engagement ring that is lost forever.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's Court cousins squabble over an expensive laptop that one claims fell out of the back of a rental SUV.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 28
programme.desc: Mother and Daughter face off in Judge Rhonda's courtroom over a secret breast augmentation surgery.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 64
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 80
programme.desc: An identical twin and her mother accuse a twin sister of burning down her own home for the insurance money in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 3
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda unravels a Rap Artist's mess between a new manager and her cousin, the old manager.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 46
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda solves a carpet caper when a cat named Maserati runs rampant over a mother and daughter's relationship.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A flooded fancy bathtub ruined the brand new hardwood floors an ex son in-law installed to make his ex-wife's Mom comfortable and that damage splashed this family drama all over Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 65
programme.desc: When an older sister became the legal "mother" for her two young sisters, she and her husband paid all of their bills; now that one is a grown exotic dancer, money makes them face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 116
programme.desc: In Judge Rhonda's courtroom, a dispute over stimulus money reveals the family secret that is tearing three generations apart.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 88
programme.desc: Family is family, but when the money and the honies draw this niece to St. Louis, her aunt takes a trip to Judge Rhonda to solve this construction nightmare.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: What happened in Vegas ended up in Judge Rhonda's courtroom when two cousins who grew up like brothers fight over car damage and long simmering jealousy.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 114
programme.desc: When a mother drags her only child, a hoarder, into court and he accuses her of stealing items from him Judge Rhonda orders a polygraph test to settle this score, once and for all.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 85
programme.desc: Parents of a bratty boomerangdaughter reach the end of their rope and turn to Judge Rhonda for guidance when their young one asks for cash to buy weed.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 141
programme.desc: A Valentine's Day date gone horribly wrong forces the cool uncle who lost a possession he loved almost as much as his wife and child to drag his nephew in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 110
programme.desc: Sisters dance apart in Judge Rhonda's courtroom when the one who owns the dance & fitness studio stops paying the other.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When his legally blind uncle needed some help around the house this nephew stepped in and the job with the "fun uncle" went so badly that they ended up in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 144
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces an angry Mom who claims her daughter spent her $5,000 gift for college rent on tattoos.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: First cousins who were more like sisters hit the rocks over a cruise that one paid for after the other's car exploded in flames; Judge Rhonda wades through this inferno to try to land these two on the beach.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 11
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda sorts out the dispute between a mother who said go to College or pay the bills and her son who tried to choose a third option.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 22
programme.desc: A round trip ticket from Japan to attend a family funeral flys two cousins into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: What goes up must come down is an investment strategy Judge Rhonda has to explain to a neice who's favorite Uncle has lost a lot of her money on Wall Street.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 47
programme.desc: Comedian Kung Fu Panda claims his sister paid no rent and tried to poison him with her cooking, Judge Rhonda digs into the hot meal vs. free rent controversy.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda reveals the DNA results to siblings who clash over money and the paternity of one of the brother's six children.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 143
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda settles the case between a sister who bought a truck to pull her boat instead of repaying money borrowed from her sister in desperation.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 90
programme.desc: When her marriage falls apart after three months of alcohol abuse, this single mom wants Judge Rhonda to make her estranged husband pay for their divorce.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 31
programme.desc: A nearly fatal truck collision drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Court where an accident reconstruction expert reveals forensic results.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A woman on her last nerve drags her cheating estranged husband to Judge Rhonda's courtroom for a lesson in responsibility.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Their fairy-tale turns grim when her godson kills houseplants she has nurtured for over fifty years and named after friends the plants outlived; Judge Rhonda tries to revive this garden massacre.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 77
programme.desc: Twin sisters and their wives bring their long festering drama over an heirloom clock into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 66
programme.desc: A simple video with a "tall beer toast" went viral, generated a $2,200 payment, and brought a formerly close brother and sister to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 40
programme.desc: Godbrothers argue over an apartment loan and a surprise secret witness turns the tables in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 10
programme.desc: A husband's affair with his wife's cousin is revealed when a valuable collection is stolen from their car and Judge Rhonda settles the score.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: One Hit Wonder
programme.desc: When Joanne Crooks is assaulted in her home, Catherine, Grissom, Nick, Warrick and Capt. Brass assume the investigation. They find fingerprints on the windows and they learn that the criminal is escalating in his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crash And Burn
programme.desc: An elderly lady drives her car recklessly into a café for no apparent reason. Meanwhile, a wife dies of carbon monoxide poisoning while her husband does not even though he was sleeping right next to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Precious Metal
programme.desc: A badly decomposed body of a man is found in a chemical waste barrel. The markings on the barrel indicates that it came from a warehouse, now used as an arena for specially-built remote-controlled robots to destroy each other.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Night At The Movies
programme.desc: A man is found stabbed to death in an art house cinema while a young shooting victim is found in a storage room with a bizarrely wide bullet hole pattern.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Last Laugh
programme.desc: While performing on the stage, the comedian Dougie Max dies. Grissom, Catherine and Capt. Brass investigate the conclude that he was poisoned by the expensive bottled water Innoko.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Forever
programme.desc: When a private jet lands after a party, they find the trainer Lori Hutchins dead apparently stomped by the horse in the cargo bay. Grissom, Catherine, Nick and Capt. Brass investigate the case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Inside The Box
programme.desc: A team of robbers heist the First Monument Bank and Detective Cyrus Lockwood is shot and murdered. The team investigate the case and find that the thieves wanted a specific safety deposit box in the vault.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pilot
programme.desc: A murder appears to be a suicide with very little evidence.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Crate ‘n Burial
programme.desc: The search is on for a abducted woman while a hit and run death of a little girl is investigated.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Pledging Mr. Johnson
programme.desc: A severed leg is found in a lake while a fraternity pledge goes badly.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Friends & Lovers
programme.desc: A young man is found naked and dead in the desert.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Who Are You?
programme.desc: Department protocol is violated when Catherine investigates her ex-husband's rape accusation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Anonymous
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his bathtub with a tape recording saying he has committed suicide. Grisson, Catherine and Sara investigate the case that becomes more complicated when Grisson's fingerprint is found at the scene crime.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Execution Of Catherine Willows
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Lust
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: High and Low
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: 21-year-old Ernesto Martinez had been seemingly living happily with 59-year-old Barry Horn - until one of them was found brutally stabbed to death at their home.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: In 1986 the body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times by her drag queen boyfriend Cliff Youens. Now he confesses to his crimes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Baby Dylan was 3 months old when his mum shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of murder and sentenced to 50 years.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: It took police 10 years to unravel a convoluted murder-for-hire plot involving three junkies and a callous hit man, which resulted in a life imprisonment sentence.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Electrician Larry Swearingen is found guilty of the murder of 19 year-old college student Melissa Trotter and now sits on death row. He says he didn't do it.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Tyra Whitney killed her daughter Tashira's boyfriend, LeMarcus Bell,with a hammer. LeMarcus died from his injuries shortly, and Tyra faced incarceration.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Stephen Schulhoff was found beaten to death. His daughter Courtney and her boyfriend are found guilty and sentenced to life with no parole, but it's not clear who was responsible.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Michael Barber finds his wife Susan in bed with another man, she realises she has to take drastic measures to stop him leaving, but no one could suspect how far she would go.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with cash stolen from multiple post offices along the coastline.
programme.sub-title: Murdered in the Line of Duty

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Just before Christmas 1994, heavily tattooed Jason Mitchell strangled pensioners Arthur and Shirley Wilson, before returning to his father's house and dismembering his body.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Roger and Josie Hartland found themselves stalked by their new homes previous owner, a former resident of a Nazi breeding camp, producing a litany of children for Hitler's Aryan race.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Helen Torbet visited the Highlands every year, but over the years the son of its proprietors, Don MacMillan Junior, began developing what can only be considered as an unhealthy obsession with her.

programme.title: Forensics
programme.desc: A team of forensic experts tackle a missing persons case. They attempt to figure out what happened to a deaf woman from Christchurch named Emma Agnew.

programme.title: Forensics
programme.desc: A man and his dog make a gruesome discover on Wellington's Red Rocks. They find a handless corpse floating on the shoreline of the beach. Investigators try to determine who he was and where he came from.

programme.title: Forensics
programme.desc: The science of pathology and mechanical engineering help reveal the true story of a man who claims he accidentally killed his ex-girlfriend in a suicide attempt.

programme.title: Forensics
programme.desc: Investigators follow multiple leads as they look into the disappearance of a woman from an Auckland motel. They discover the woman's dangerous, criminal world as they attempt to substantiate their case.

programme.title: Forensics
programme.desc: Police try to determine whether a shooting was accidental, homicide or self-defence after a man turns himself in at Palmerston North Police Station claiming to have shot another man.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murders of Sam Herr and Julie Kibuishi, both shot for financial gain by a former theatre actor who was planning an expensive wedding despite being deeply in debt.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 2013 murder of taxi driver William Spiller, who was brutally stabbed to death before being dismembered and stored in boxes that were used as a TV stand.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the case of 23-year-old Marta Ligman, a delicatessen worker who was found in a suitcase in London's Grand Union Canal after being attacked in 2015.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 1997 murder of Dawn Hacheney, whose husband set fire to their family home in Washington State, hoping the blaze would be treated as an accident.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton looks into the case of British au-pair Louise Woodward, after a child she was looking after had been rushed to a hospital unresponsive.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Ranged Weapons
programme.desc: Ranged weapons guarantee a warrior's best chance of survival. International experts survey history’s most important ranged weapons, from the Roman spear and the English longbow, right up to the futuristic railgun.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Attack From Above
programme.desc: Examining how warfare entered a new dimension as attacks from the skies became possible with weapons from incendiary arrows to drones.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy
programme.desc: In spectacular experiments, a team of international experts presents the most significant cases in the history of weapons where speed has made a decisive difference.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Power Of Destruction, The
programme.desc: New weapons with devastating force shape the wars of the 20th century. International experts test the catastrophic effects of the three most destructive weapons of our time: the machine gun, hand grenade and tank.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: War At Sea
programme.desc: A look at key maritime weapons such as the secret super-weapon that kept Constantinople safe for centuries, the thunderous force of a ship's cannon, and the deadly torpedo.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: The Ambush
programme.desc: Examining how the techniques of ambush, along with weapons that remained undetected until the very moment they were used, would revolutionise warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Deadly Inventions
programme.desc: Wars become even bloodier as new technologies continue to evolve. An international team of experts tests the deadliest weapons upgrades in the history of warfare.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Civilians On The Battlefield
programme.desc: Experts look at three types of weapon employed to attack civilian populations, from the medieval trebuchet to modern bio-weapons and nuclear bombs.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: Financing Evil
programme.desc: Munich, 12 September 1919. History is about to be changed by a penniless army corporal thirsty to avenge his adoptive motherland. 13 years later, he will be saluted as the saviour of the German nation. His name is Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: The Nazi Economic Miracle
programme.desc: Germany, 1937. By imposing his national economic policies by brute force, Adolf Hitler appears to be fulfilling his promise of returning Germany to prosperity within four years. But there is an altogether more sinister side to this economic recovery.

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: The Business Of War
programme.desc: With the help of large corporations inside and outside of Germany, Adolf Hitler conquered almost half of Europe in less than four years. Millions would be enslaved for the growth of the Nazi war machine. But in the end, what was it all for?

programme.title: Hitler's Gold: Aftermath and Injustice
programme.desc: With the end of the Second World War in Europe, the hunt for Nazi criminals started, along with the wish to bring justice to their victims, including the restitution of stolen goods, property and possessions during Hitler’s 12-year reign of terror.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Lost Continent (Atlantis)
programme.desc: As the Nazis rose to power, Himmler and the SS were convinced Atlantis could be found, and instigated a series of archeological expeditions seeking uncover and exploit its secrets.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Walking with Witches
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were a Judeo-Christian attempt to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a special team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: The Quest for the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.
programme.sub-title: The Quest for the Holy Grail

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)
programme.desc: Revealing the work of a secret team of scientists and scholars established by SS leader Heinrich Himmler to scour the globe seeking the origins of the Aryan race and collect ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Cro Magnon
programme.desc: The debate about humanity's true origins becomes a nefarious fixation as SS leader Heinrich Himmler turns his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germany's Aryan race.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Runes
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing system that harkens back to a mythological age filled with heroes, magic, and mystery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented Teens
programme.desc: Witness terrifying apparitions, and see one woman’s horrible dreams come true.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Messages From Beyond
programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented By Shadows
programme.desc: Know true fear when you hear three eerie stories about vengeful spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed
programme.desc: A teen’s risky ghost fixation grows, while a war vet almost destroys a family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: Meet people who been haunted and hurt by real demons in terrifying nightmares.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Speak

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Spirits Take Over

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor

programme.desc: Learn how three families are dealing with properties overrun by ghosts.
